title: Super Mario Paint - Dummy! (Undertale)
description:
I went to look and apparently nobody's done this yet?? It was quite an entertaining project, referencing about 3 separate midis, Danooct's FTM (you rock, dude), and the original MP3 because nobody can quite seem to agree on certain parts of it.

Don't expect two uploads inside of a week again anytime soon though.
